setup.title: Welcome to LogFizz
setup.description: Please select your preferred language and date format to get started.
setup.statsMailDescription: Receive a summary of your working hours by email.

auth.tooManyVerificationAttempts: Too many verification requests. Please wait 15 minutes before trying again.

import.semicolonDetected: ℹ️ Detected semicolon-separated CSV (common in European formats)

import.unexpectedErrorParsing: ❌ An unexpected error occurred while parsing the CSV file.

payment.confirmCancelSubscription: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription? You will keep access until the end of the current billing period.

settings.autoToggle: Stop all timers when starting a new one
settings.autoToggleDescription: When enabled, starting a project will stop all other running projects.
settings.dateTimeDescription: Controls how dates and times are displayed
settings.deleteAccountConfirmation: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? This action cannot be undone and will remove all your data.
settings.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountFailed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
settings.deleteAccountSuccess: Your account has been deleted successfully.
settings.downloadDataDescription: Download all your data in JSON format (GDPR compliant).
settings.downloadDataFailed: Failed to download data. Please try again.
settings.downloadDataSuccess: Your data has been downloaded successfully.
settings.editOnStopDescription: When enabled, stopping a project will open the edit form to add e.g. notes.
settings.emailChangeSent: Verification email sent to your new address.
settings.emailChangeSentDescription: We've sent a verification link to your new email address. Click the link to confirm the change.
settings.invalidEmailChangeToken: Invalid or expired email change link.
settings.firstDayDescription: Sets the first day of the week in calendar views
settings.recalculateDescription: Recalculates all balance data from timelogs.
settings.statisticsEmailDescription: Receive a periodic email with your current work balance summary.
settings.title: Settings

subscription.accessUntilEnd: You will continue to have access until the end of your billing period.
subscription.paywallNotActive: The subscription paywall is not active. You have full access to all features.
subscription.renewDescription: Your subscription is scheduled to end. Undo the cancellation to keep uninterrupted access.
subscription.thankYouSubscribing: Thank you for subscribing to LogFizz. Your subscription is now active.
subscription.viewSubscriptionStatus: View your subscription status and manage your billing.

target.assignTimersDescription: Select projects to track time towards this target. Selected projects will count their time entries against this target's work hours.
target.deleteConfirmation: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete
target.deleteScheduleConfirmation: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this schedule?
target.name: Target Name
target.noTimersAvailable: No projects available. Create a project first to assign them to this target.
target.setEndDateDescription: Set an end date to archive this target. The current schedule will end on the selected date.
target.specsDescription: Define work schedules for different time periods. Each schedule specifies the expected working hours per weekday.
target.title: Targets

timelog.addNotesDescription: Add notes or adjust end time (optional). Click "Save" when done.
timelog.applyBreakCalcDescription: Automatically deduct breaks based on German labor law.
timelog.changeTimezone: Changing the timezone adjusts how the times are displayed.
timelog.deleteConfirmation: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this time entry?
timelog.notesPlaceholder: Add any notes about this time entry...
timelog.specialTypesDescription: Special types (Sick, Holiday, Business Trip, Child Sick) affect balance calculations differently.
timelog.wholeDayRequired: Required for special types to ensure proper balance calculations.

timelogform.endBeforeStart: End time must be after start time
timelogform.minDuration: Duration must be at least 1 minute

timer.archivedTimersHidden: Archived projects are hidden from the main view but their data is preserved.
timer.autoSubtractBreaksDescription: Automatically subtract break time based on German work rules
timer.deleteConfirmation: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete

timer.targetDescription: This determines which work hours this project counts towards
